title: skopeo copy does not merge OCI indexes
body:
If I have a docker registry with (say) c1:tag1 and c1:tag2, I can

skopeo copy docker://c1:tag1 oci:c1:tag1
skopeo copy docker://c1:tag2 oci:c1:tag2

The second copy luckily will not remove nor refetch the blobs from tag1 (which is good), however it will result in a index.json that does not contain tag1 any more.  I would like to end up with an OCI layout with all the tags I individually pulled.

Is there a way to do this automatically?

If not I'll have to manually rebuild the index.json...

comments.body: Thanks for your report. This can’t be done right now, a fix is being worked on at https://github.com/containers/image/pull/326 .
Indeed, thanks for pointing this out.
